title: sphaerostephanos tephrophyllus
intro: Sphaerostephanos tephrophyllus is a species of fern within the family Dryniaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sphaerostephanos tephrophyllus include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion in the lungs, making it a valuable natural remedy for respiratory health. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction to be consumed as a tea, and can also be used topically in the form of a poultice or ointment to treat skin conditions.
